framing: transfer = placebo-corrected residual + confound DISCLOSED, NOT net causal. The cross-family durable coefficient survives a permutation null (perm_p ~ 0.0099) but a FUTURE-on-PAST placebo recovers ~42% of the past-effect magnitude, so a large share of the apparent transfer is a state/selection confound (the durable cross effect is mostly proximity/shared-learner-state, not a clean causal transfer pathway). Report as 'placebo-corrected residual, confound disclosed', never as net causal transfer.
provenance_note: These transfer coefficients are NOT computed on the sealed anchor run-d2154070 (Kalman-alone). The prospective-transfer probe runs over the Junyi interaction CSVs / full mastery-trajectory population (within-learner FE + state controls), NOT over the per-row sealed columns. They are reported here as the canonical stored transfer-probe artifacts, which the thesis transfer claims are grounded on. Source artifacts pre-date the Kalman re-seal; the transfer mechanism (DAG-routed prerequisite edges) is V1-runtime-inherited, same JT/ADC inheritance noted for governance extracts (see KALMAN_OVERLAY_GOVERNANCE_SCOPING.md).

durable_coefficient.note: b_durable_CROSS_past = 0.09147 is the cross-family durable transfer coefficient (within-learner FE + state controls). Far above the paper_target_cross of 0.007 cited in the probe spec.

placebo_ratio.interpretation: future-on-past placebo recovers 41.7% of the past durable-cross effect -> ~42% of apparent cross-family transfer is confounded by learner state/selection; the placebo-corrected residual is the remaining ~58%.

perm_p.interpretation: cross-family durable effect is significant against a 100-draw permutation null (smallest attainable p at K=100 = 1/101 = 0.0099).

durable_same_family_vs_cross.family_def: same = shared name-stem OR same topic; cross = otherwise
durable_same_family_vs_cross.interpretation: same-family durable transfer (0.11865) > cross-family (0.09147); both positive and significant, same-family stronger as expected for prerequisite-proximate concepts.

prospective_probe_v3_subsample.note: 1/10-sample replicate of v3_full; placebo_ratio 0.409 vs 0.417 confirms stability.

prospective_probe_v2.note: v2 is the un-split (no same/cross) estimator; its placebo (-0.01407) is near the null_mean, i.e. when not split by family the aggregate placebo is ~zero. v3's family split is what surfaces the ~42% cross-family confound. The paper-target reconciliation FAILED (probe magnitudes 0.09-0.14 >> paper_target durable 0.007 / total 0.02): the system effect is LARGER than the conservative paper headline, not smaller.

prospective_probe_stage1.note: Stage-1 shuffled-DAG placebo (-0.05285) is strongly negative vs real (+0.13454), establishing the real-vs-shuffled separation; durable here 0.09713 matches v3 cross 0.09147.

transfer_activation_phase2.claim: jt_transfer_contribution (transfer_realized JT dimension) goes dormant -> ACTIVE only when Junyi DAG prerequisite edges (1,052) are routed into TransferLearningEngine; mean 0.00603 -> 0.03462, signal_ratio 0.009 -> 1.106, mean delta 0.02859.
transfer_activation_phase2.framing: This is the GOVERNANCE-side transfer dimension (JT 6D), 3-learner-runtime / V1-inherited per KALMAN_OVERLAY_GOVERNANCE_SCOPING.md. It is the topology-class ecology result (explicit_dag activates, flat_skill_tag stays structural_zero), NOT the prospective predictive coefficient above. Keep distinct from the v3 b_durable transfer coefficient.
transfer_activation_phase2.inheritance_disclosure: JT/ADC magnitudes on this seal are inherited from the V1 runtime (canonical mastery on the seal = m_K Kalman-alone); see D:/Code/cld-main/cld-main/ProjectHCIE/RealSystem/research_validation/KALMAN_OVERLAY_GOVERNANCE_SCOPING.md.

availability: AVAILABLE from stored probe artifacts (read-only, no new run generated). All five requested slots (durable coefficient, proximity, placebo, placebo_ratio ~0.42, perm_p ~0.0099, durable same vs cross) resolved from prospective_probe_v3_full.json. NOTE: 'from ledger, reconfirm' does NOT apply -- these are the actual stored probe-output JSONs, not ledger-quoted reference values.
caveats: Probe population != sealed anchor population: the transfer probe runs over the full mastery-trajectory CSV population (1.97M rows / 232k users), not the sealed run-d2154070 (96,727 rows). Cite as the grounding artifact for transfer claims, not as a sealed-run readout.

Probe magnitudes (b_durable 0.09-0.12) are an order of magnitude above the conservative paper headline (durable ~0.007). The thesis headline is the deliberately conservative number; this probe shows the raw effect is larger. reconciles_to_paper=false in v2 reflects this, not a failure of significance.
Placebo-correction: report the ~42% future/past ratio as the disclosed confound. Net of placebo, the cross-family durable residual is the defensible (non-causal-claimed) finding.
